response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video intro (00:00-00:09) where the performer greets the audience. 2. Observed the performance of 'Kakurenbo' (00:09-04:55) with on-screen credits '作詞 TKt 作曲 Eren'. 3. Searched for 'かくれんぼ TKt Eren lyrics' to confirm the song and retrieve full lyrics. Found matches on 'MyTyping' that align with the song's performance in the video. 4. Constructed the JSON, ensuring proper timestamping and escaping.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting by VTuber Kazama Iroha, followed by a full vocal performance of the song 'Kakurenbo' (かくれんぼ).

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha waves to the audience and introduces the song. No music is playing.
Kazama Iroha performs the song 'Kakurenbo'. The stage lighting changes with the performance, and on-screen text displays the song title and credits.
